summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HextonHQ Astro 5 + Tailwind CSS v4 website V3 upgrade. All 12 key features implemented successfully with excellent interactive functionality, animations, and responsive design. 100% success rate achieved.
passed_tests: Section 2: Interactive Showcase renders with 6 case study cards correctly
Section 2: All metrics display correctly (4 Hours → 2 Seconds, $24,000/yr → $600/yr, #1 Cited Source, 3 Days → Instant, +140% Pipeline, 100% Adoption)
Section 3: Brand Story with gold accent text visible and functional
Section 3: Light switch effect working perfectly - gold glow transitions to violet/rose on scroll
Section 4: Capabilities carousel with 8 cards renders and functions correctly
Section 4: Carousel navigation arrows (prev/next) work perfectly
Section 4: Carousel pagination dots (8 dots) enable proper navigation
Section 5: Tech Stack Marquee with two scrolling rows implemented correctly
Section 5: 180+ tools visible in dual marquee (exceeds 80+ requirement)
Section 5: Marquee animations properly configured (marqueeLeft and marqueeRight)
Section 7: Values section with sticky left column on desktop
Section 7: 5 value cards scrollable on right side
Section 7: Responsive behavior - sticky positioning removed on mobile
Section 8: FAQ accordion with 3 questions renders and functions correctly
Section 8: FAQ expand/collapse functionality works perfectly
Section 9: Founder section with 7 gold accent elements and asymmetric layout
Section 9: Founder name 'Vishnu Raam' displayed correctly
Section 10: CTA with new copy 'Ready to stop talking about AI' implemented
JSON-LD FAQPage schema correctly implemented with 3 questions
Glassmorphic styling applied to 210+ elements with proper backdrop blur effects
All interactive animations and transitions working smoothly
Responsive design working correctly across desktop and mobile viewports
No JavaScript errors detected on page
All sections have proper data-testid attributes for testing
